    I

    I - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.Era
    First era of the game.
    II - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.Era
    Second era of the game.
    III - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.Era
    Third and final era of the game.
    ImageLoader - Class in it.polimi.Network.Client
    Utility class to load and cache card images for the JavaFX client.
    ImageLoader() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Client.ImageLoader
     
    InGame_Effect - Class in it.polimi.Buildings
    Represents a building that provides a continuous in-game effect.
    InGame_Effect(Era, Position, int, int, List, int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Buildings.InGame_Effect
    Constructs an InGame_Effect building with the specified properties.
    initialize(int) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Initializes the game state for the given number of players.
    initialize(int, List) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Initializes the game state for the given players using the provided player colors.
    INSTANCE - Static variable in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.NoOpGameResultRepository
     
    Inventor - Class in it.polimi.Characters
    Represents an Inventor character in the game.
    Inventor(Era, int, InventorIcon) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Characters.Inventor
    Constructs an Inventor character with the specified properties.
    INVENTOR - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.CharacterType
    Specialized in technological icons.
    InventorIcon - Enum Class in it.polimi.Constants
    Represents the various icons found on Inventor cards.
    isConnected() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiClientConnection
     
    isEnabledFromJSON() - Static method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.DbSettings
    Checks if score persistence is enabled in the configuration file.
    isEvent() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Character
    Characters are never events.
    isEvent() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Event
    Events are always marked as event cards.
    isEvent() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Tribe
    Returns whether this tribe card is an event.
    isGameFinished() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.GameController
     
    isOnline() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Checks if the player is currently online.
    isSuccess() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Common.SerializedUpdate
    Checks if the update denotes a successful operation.
    isSuccess() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.RMI.RmiLoginResponse
